decision_notes: Official Penn Pathology page states the Molecular Genetic Pathology fellowship duration is one year and the matched program scope is the MGP fellowship.
Official Penn Pathology page states Neuropathology offers a two-year ACGME-accredited clinical training program.
Do not accept extracted 2-year duration: official page describes first full research year followed by subsequent two clinical years, so the phrase does not support a 2-year total lifecycle.
